title: I'm a Normal Middle School Student
overview: Luluco aims to live a normal life in the abnormal town of Ogikubo, a space immigration zone where humans and aliens coexist, but her normal life comes crashing down with a bang one morning.

title: A New Transfer Student Arrives!
overview: Things get stranger for Luluco, as the arrival of a transfer student and a new partner shake things up even further.

title: Battlefield Classroom
overview: The newly formed team of Luluco and Nova head to school to look for Save the World, the alien circulating the Blackhole app.

title: Into the Sky All Alone
overview: A meteorite comes hurtling towards Ogikubo, and only the Space Patrol trio can prevent Armageddon.

title: What Should I Do?
overview: Lalaco Godspeed, Luluco's mother and Space Pirate Captain, unveils her grand plan... and it involves Ogikubo?!

title: That One Part Awakens
overview: Space Pirate Lalaco Godspeed is on a rampage, and only one man can stop her.

title: The Trap of Fate's Threads
overview: The Space Patrol gang have to find Ogikubo quickly, or they'll have nowhere to go home to! That's when they stumble upon a rather strange planet...

title: The Trap of the Mystical Power
overview: Luluco and gang stumble upon a rather magical planet during their quest to find Ogikubo.

title: The True Trap
overview: Luluco wants relationship advice, and who better to turn to than a detective agency?

title: It's All Over
overview: The shocking truth comes to light in truly heart-breaking fashion.

title: I Was Clueless
overview: Luluco finds herself dead and in Hell, where she runs into a man who has been there, done that.

title: Confession
overview: Back to life, Luluco decides confront to Nova once and for all.

title: I'll Give Chase to the Ends of the Universe
overview: Luluco and Nova, united at last, take on the Blackholeian in a battle for the universe.
